ideation: This sequence simulates the action of using a fork and knife with a plate.  The animation will focus on bringing the hands together near the mouth, then returning to a resting position. The robot doesn't have hands, so the action will be represented by the arms moving in a manner suggestive of eating.  The left arm will simulate holding the fork, and the right arm will simulate holding the knife.  I will check the existing examples for reference.  Frame 1: Both arms start in a neutral position. Frame 2: The left arm moves slightly forward and upward, representing the fork being lifted. The right arm moves forward and upward, but slightly less than the left arm, representing the knife being lifted. Frame 3: Both arms move closer to the mouth, simulating the act of bringing food to the mouth. Frame 4: The arms return to their initial positions. Frame 5: Both arms return to a relaxed resting position.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready to dine
lifting fork and knife to begin
bringing food to the mouth with care
arms return to a relaxed resting pose
